title: Modded Bare Bones
description: Mods with the style of the trailers
body:
## What Is the purpose of this pack?
This resource pack adds compatibility between Bare Bones and other mods.
## What mods are supported?
- [Clown Scythe](https://ko-fi.com/post/Clown-Scythe-for-Minecraft-1-19-V7V5DQU37)
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
- [Berry Good](https://modrinth.com/mod/berry-good)
- [Blast](https://modrinth.com/mod/blast)
- [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [https://modrinth.com/mod/create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation)
- [Effective](https://modrinth.com/mod/effective)
- [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi)
- [Enchancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchancement)
- [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
- [Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure)

If there are any issues please let me know in the discord server!
